PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('foo')
    PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiPuppetExpressionUnaryImpl(EXPRESSION_UNARY)
        PsiElement(*)('*')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('args')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallExpressionImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_EXPRESSION)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('foo')
    PsiPuppetParenthesizedExpressionsListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_EXPRESSIONS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiPuppetExpressionUnaryImpl(EXPRESSION_UNARY)
        PsiElement(*)('*')
        PsiPuppetArrayImpl(ARRAY)
          PsiElement([)('[')
          PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
            PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
            PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('2')
          PsiElement(,)(',')
          PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
            PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('3')
          PsiElement(])(']')
      PsiElement())(')')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetExpressionAdditiveImpl(EXPRESSION_ADDITIVE)
      PsiPuppetExpressionUnaryImpl(EXPRESSION_UNARY)
        PsiElement(*)('*')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('b')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement(+)('+')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiPuppetExpressionUnaryImpl(EXPRESSION_UNARY)
        PsiElement(*)('*')
        Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
          PsiElement($)('$')
          PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('c')
